'''''Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 7: Darklighter''''' is the seventh of the ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|TPBs]], released on [[September 5]], [[2007]]. It is a hardcover version of ''[[Star Wars: Empire Volume 2: Darklighter]]''.

{{Comics-stub}}

*[[Empire 10|''Empire'' 10]]
*[[Empire 11|''Empire'' 11]]
